message:
chore(charmed_log): Update test dependencies and expand error type tests

- Updates Cargo.lock with resolved dependency versions
- Expands error type test coverage in charmed_log crate
- Adds new test dependency to Cargo.toml

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,15 @@
 # It is not intended for manual editing.
 version = 4
 
+[[package]]
+name = "addr2line"
+version = "0.25.1"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "1b5d307320b3181d6d7954e663bd7c774a838b8220fe0593c86d9fb09f498b4b"
+dependencies = [
+ "gimli",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "adler2"
 version = "2.0.1"
@@ -174,6 +183,21 @@ version = "1.5.0"

 version = "0.2.0"

 name = "charmed_log"
 version = "0.1.0"

  "thiserror 2.0.18",

 ]
